title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at Care Ratings Capital India

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at Care Ratings Capital India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Care Ratings Capital India in Meerut is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Care Ratings Capital India:
Care Ratings Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Care Ratings Capital India!
